title: FutureCraft+
description: FutureCraft+ is an expanded version of the FutureCraft modpack that brings new features, optimizations and an improved gameplay experience.
body:
![Introductory banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14de168cc8ac2d727184b59f833f5ea6d44d7eb3_0.webp)
🧭 About This Modpack

FutureCraft+ is a modpack focused on technology, space exploration, and automation. Its goal is to allow players to explore the entire Milky Way and automate all possible processes.

Modpack also adds countless other features, such as new animal textures, custom world generation, biomes, and structures. The most significant elements come from the "Mekanism" mod, which provides several tools that allow you to build truly advanced farms.


⭐ Official FutureCraft+ Server

Want to dive into an adventure with a community of players who love technology and space exploration as much as you do? Then look no further than our official FutureCraft+ server!

Join us and:

Collaborate with others, build huge automated factories and technology bases together with your friends. Discover and explore, travel together to the Moon or to the most distant biomes. The server is full of places to discover. Create your own story, whether you're an engineer, explorer, or just an enthusiastic builder, you'll find your place on our server. All the information you need to connect, such as the IP address and game rules, can be found on our Discord server channels. Join us and become part of our growing community!


🎯 Target Audience

This modpack is designed for experienced players seeking deeper technological systems, space exploration, and automation. It is ideal for players who already have experience with Minecraft mods and want to dive into complex mechanics.


💚 Partner and project initiator

⚙️ Technical Details

Game Version: 1.20.1 | Forge Version: 47.4.6 | Recommended RAM: 8GB


Note: The FutureCraft+ modpack is still under development and is actively being updated. Many features are still in development or are placeholders until they are completed. Some existing features will be further improved during development. We plan to add many more features, including regular optimization and monitoring.

Join our Discord server to follow the development process, chat with the team, ask questions, and get a sneak peek at upcoming features!


➕ More Contents:

Attribution:
  • Cosmetic Armor Reworked - This mod allows you to wear two sets of armor, one for display, one for function.
  • Nature's Compass - Allows you to locate biomes anywhere in the world.

    Resourcepacks:
  • Motschen's Better Leaves (not enabled by default) - Resource pack to make leaves look bushier.
  • Fresh Animations (not enabled by default) - Improved animations for all mobs.
  • ↳ Fresh Animations: Extensions (not enabled by default) - Improved animations for all mobs. (New variations added)

    • Shaderpacks:
  • BSL Shaders (enabled by default) - Recommended shader pack.


    • ![Footer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd17399670f293a4da703cc204a91c99562c02a1.png)
